claim: Context engineering is shifting from one-shot prompts to preparing complete information environments where LLMs have everything needed to reason correctly
actionable: Instead of clever phrasing, focus on providing complete, structured, relevant information to agents; this is more impactful than prompt engineering tricks.
source_title: NODES AI 2026 - Build Intelligent AI Agents With Context Engineering

claim: Garbage in = garbage out applies to LLM context; quality of information provided to models is the determining factor in output quality
actionable: Invest in data quality, deduplication, and curation for your knowledge bases; poor information will always produce poor agent decisions.
source_title: NODES AI 2026 - Build Intelligent AI Agents With Context Engineering

claim: Large context windows don't solve retrieval problems; large amounts of irrelevant information confuse models (context bloat, needle-in-haystack)
actionable: Don't assume large context windows fix RAG problems; continue using selective retrieval, filtering, and context curation.
source_title: NODES AI 2026 - Build Intelligent AI Agents With Context Engineering

claim: Minimal viable context approach: system prompt, instructions, role, constraints, example selection, minimal tools, and user request - exclude filler
actionable: Design prompts with high signal-to-noise ratios; include only essential information, constraints, and examples needed for the task.
source_title: NODES AI 2026 - Build Intelligent AI Agents With Context Engineering

claim: Structuring information hierarchically (headers, tags, subsections) lets agents navigate deeper as needed instead of drowning in flat text
actionable: Organize context with clear hierarchies; provide summary-level information up front and tools for agents to drill down into details.
source_title: NODES AI 2026 - Build Intelligent AI Agents With Context Engineering

claim: Memory systems (short-term, long-term, episodic, procedural) are critical context sources; agents need to retrieve relevant memories for task reasoning
actionable: Implement multi-layer memory systems for agents; make memory retrievable via tools so agents can access relevant past information.
source_title: NODES AI 2026 - Build Intelligent AI Agents With Context Engineering

claim: Over-providing tools confuses agents; filter tools to those relevant for the current task rather than giving all available tools
actionable: Pre-filter tools based on task context; use tool grouping, dependencies, or hierarchies to surface only relevant tools.
source_title: NODES AI 2026 - Build Intelligent AI Agents With Context Engineering

claim: Context serves as a navigation guide for agents through complex information spaces; good context engineering guides agents to solutions like a travel guide
actionable: Design context as a map or guide that orients agents toward solutions; make navigation paths clear through structure and hierarchy.
source_title: NODES AI 2026 - Build Intelligent AI Agents With Context Engineering

claim: Graph databases capture not just data but metadata and execution traces; this enables capturing decision-making reasoning for agents
actionable: Use graph databases for agent memory and knowledge graphs; they enable rich semantic relationships and capture decision traces.
source_title: NODES AI 2026 - Build Intelligent AI Agents With Context Engineering

claim: Agents play important roles in all three phases of agent loops: reasoning (access to memory and guidance), action (tool calls and retrieval), observation (result judgment and memory compression)
actionable: Design agent systems that manage context throughout the loop: provide relevant information during reasoning, update memory during observation.
source_title: NODES AI 2026 - Build Intelligent AI Agents With Context Engineering
